description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a low fence and landscaping that includes a large, stylized tree and several conical shrubs. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color with wood-textured accents, and the flat roof is bordered by a parapet. Large windows and sliding glass doors are visible along the sides, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The house features a driveway leading to the main entrance, which is set back from the street and flanked by greenery. The interior layout is open, with visible partitions for different rooms and a clear separation between living and private areas.
description: A modern, single-story rectangular house with a flat roof, large windows, wood-textured accents, and landscaped surroundings including a prominent tree and driveway.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long facade, flat roof, wood-textured wall, and a large stylized tree at the front corner.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the driveway, main entryway, and the arrangement of rooms visible through large windows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the length of the house, flat roof, and the tree positioned at the rear corner.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back garden area, tree, and the end of the house with visible room partitions.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a simple door, no porch, flanked by landscaping and accessed via a driveway
